bio: Son of [Yadollah Sahabi](/people/yadollah-sahabi). Co-founder of the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran). He was elected to the [Assembly of Experts for the Constitution](/orgs/assembly-of-experts-for-constitution) in 1979, representing Tehran Province, where he opposed the concentration of power in the velayat-e faqih provisions. Imprisoned 3 times under the Pahlavi regime (10.8 years total) and twice under the Islamic Republic (1.3 years). Active in nationalist-religious opposition politics. Co-founded the [Council of Nationalist-Religious Activists](/orgs/council-of-nationalist-religious-activists) in 2000.
editorial_notes: Son of Yadollah Sahabi. Multiple imprisonments under both regimes.
